name: orivisa
description: ORIVISA - Australian Migration Consultancy & Student Platform

scripts.run: lsof -ti :3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :4000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; npm run dev
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
